an8.91-117:1.1:
Then the female lay follower Bojjhā … Sirimā … Padumā … Sutanā … Manujā … Uttarā … Muttā … Khemā … Somā
… Rucī … Princess Cundī … the female lay follower Bimbī … Princess Sumanā …
Queen Mallikā … the female lay follower Tissā … Soṇā the mother of Tissā … the mother of Soṇā … Kāṇā … the mother of Kāṇā … Uttarā Nandamātā
… Visākhā Migāramātā … the female lay follower Khujjuttarā … the female lay follower Sāmāvatī … Suppavāsā the Koliyan daughter … the female lay follower Suppiyā … the housewife Nakulamātā …
